title: Boer vs Brit at GRT Golf Club
description: LOCAL NEWS AND VIDEO - The 'Slag van...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"LOCAL NEWS AND VIDEO - The 'Slag van Spandaukop Boer vs Brit' shotgun better-ball competition just started off at Graaff-Reinet Golf Club this afternoon.","html":"LOCAL NEWS AND VIDEO - The 'Slag van Spandaukop Boer vs Brit' shotgun better-ball competition just started off at Graaff-Reinet Golf Club this afternoon."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Golf skills and camaraderie are being tested to the limit to see who the champions will be this year. Last year, the Boere won, and the Brits are out today in red to make a comeback."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The golf course is in superb condition and the players are out to make the best of the competition. Club captain Derek Helm provides the formalities to the competitors, and it is game on!","html":"The golf course is in superb condition and the players are out to make the best of the competition. Club captain Derek Helm provides the formalities to the competitors, and it is game on!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"VIDEO: 'Slag van Spandaukop Boer vs Brit' in action!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
